svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "Brenda Stubbert's Reel"

text.tspan: Source: Ashley MacIssac, Hi™ How Are You Today? (1995)
Notes: Ashley plays it in Bb, but the standard key is A (Dorian). He also adds a third part, but I'm
leaving it out because it's pretty repetitive and not standard.
